title: Letters to Shareholders | Brookfield Asset Management (BAM)
relevant_snippets: Listen to an audio version of Brookfield Asset Management's Q4 2025 Letter to Shareholders to learn about the firm’s progress across renewable power & transition, infrastructure, private equity, real estate, and credit strategies.
